---
title: "DMRCate code"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2025-10-17"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}
# dmr_analysis_tier3_only.R
# Run DMRcate (Tier 3) on preprocessed methylation data
# Goal: region-level multiple-testing correction complementing CpG-level EWAS

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
  library(DMRcate)
  library(GenomicRanges)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
phenotypes <- c(any="any_mets", ln="ln_only", dist="distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90

dir.create(results_root, showWarnings=FALSE, recursive=TRUE)
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings=FALSE, recursive=TRUE)

## ── 1) β-matrix loading / QC ────────────────────────────────────────────────
read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive=TRUE, extended=TRUE, force=TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod="single"))
  if (tag=="v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet[setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop=FALSE]
}

beta_rds <- file.path(cache_dir,"beta_comb_qc.rds")
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1,"v1"); beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2,"v2")
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1),rownames(beta2))
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common,], beta2[common,])
  saveRDS(list(beta=beta_comb,
               sample_ids_v1=colnames(beta1),
               sample_ids_v2=colnames(beta2)), beta_rds)
  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  beta_comb <- cache_obj$beta
  sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1; sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

## ── Remove sex-linked probes ────────────────────────────────────────────────
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
chr_vec <- anno$chr[match(rownames(beta_comb), rownames(anno))]
is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
beta_comb <- beta_comb[!is_sex_chr,,drop=FALSE]
msg(sum(is_sex_chr)," chrX/chrY probes removed; ",nrow(beta_comb)," CpGs remain.")

## ── Variance filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb/pmax(1-beta_comb,1e-6)+1e-6)
if (variance_percentile>0){
  v <- rowVars(M.mat,na.rm=TRUE)
  thr <- quantile(v,variance_percentile,na.rm=TRUE)
  keep <- v>thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep,,drop=FALSE]
  M.mat <- M.mat[keep,,drop=FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep)," CpGs kept (top ",100*(1-variance_percentile),"% var).")
}

## ── 2) Deconvolution (EpiScore + HiTIMED) ───────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)
fib_scores <- {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta_comb),rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est <- epidish(beta_comb[common,],centEpiFibIC.m[common,],method="RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est)*100
} %>% rownames_to_column("SampleID")

msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb,"COAD",h=6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores,by="SampleID")

collapse_frac <- function(df){
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv","Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols],na.rm=TRUE); totalImm[totalImm==0] <- NA
  tibble(
    SampleID=df$SampleID,
    Tumor=get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast=get_("Fib"),
    StromalOther=get_("Endothelial")+get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T=(get_("CD8mem")+get_("CD8nv"))/totalImm,
    LymphOther=(get_("CD4mem")+get_("CD4nv")+get_("Treg")+get_("Bmem")+get_("Bnv"))/totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric),as.numeric))
}

tier3_covs <- c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
                "Fibroblast","StromalOther","CD8_T","LymphOther")

## ── 3) DMRcate (Tier 3 only) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
get_dmrc_results <- function(dmrc) {
  # DMRcate 3.4.1 and newer (S4 object with slots)
  if (methods::is(dmrc, "DMResults")) {
    df <- data.frame(
      coord            = slot(dmrc, "coord"),
      no.cpgs          = slot(dmrc, "no.cpgs"),
      min_smoothed_fdr = slot(dmrc, "min_smoothed_fdr"),
      Stouffer         = slot(dmrc, "Stouffer"),
      HMFDR            = slot(dmrc, "HMFDR"),
      Fisher           = slot(dmrc, "Fisher"),
      maxdiff          = slot(dmrc, "maxdiff"),
      meanmeth.diff    = slot(dmrc, "meandiff"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    # Split coord into chr/start/end
    chr_parts <- do.call(rbind, strsplit(df$coord, "[:-]"))
    df$chr   <- chr_parts[,1]
    df$start <- as.numeric(chr_parts[,2])
    df$end   <- as.numeric(chr_parts[,3])
    df$FDR   <- df$min_smoothed_fdr
    return(df)
  }

  # Older versions (list or S4 with 'results' slot)
  if ("results" %in% names(dmrc)) return(dmrc$results)
  if ("results" %in% slotNames(dmrc)) return(slot(dmrc, "results"))

  stop("Unsupported DMRcate object structure")
}

for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " (DMRcate Tier 3) =====")

  meta <- readr::read_csv(meta_csv, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      any_mets = as.integer(any_mets),
      distant  = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
      ln_only  = as.integer(ln_only),
      sex_num  = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  meta$pheno_bin <- dplyr::case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE ~ NA_integer_
  )

  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- dplyr::left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- stats::complete.cases(meta_all[, tier3_covs])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

  # Tier 3 design
  is_var <- vapply(meta_f[tier3_covs],
                   function(x) is.numeric(x) && is.finite(sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
                   logical(1))
  nz   <- tier3_covs[is_var]
  form <- as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
  des  <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)

  # Annotate and call DMRs
  myAnno <- DMRcate::cpg.annotate(
    object        = M_f,
    datatype      = "array",
    what          = "M",
    analysis.type = "differential",
    design        = des,
    coef          = which(colnames(des) == "pheno_bin"),
    fdr           = 1,             # already variance-filtered
    arraytype     = "EPICv1"
  )

  msg("Running DMRcate smoothing/aggregation …")
  dmrc <- DMRcate::dmrcate(myAnno, lambda = 1000, C = 2)
  dmr_tbl <- get_dmrc_results(dmrc)
  if (nrow(dmr_tbl) == 0) {
    msg("No DMRs detected for ", pheno_var); next
  }
  
  # Safety check before ordering
  if (all(c("FDR", "no.cpgs") %in% names(dmr_tbl))) {
    dmr_tbl <- dmr_tbl[order(dmr_tbl$FDR, -dmr_tbl$no.cpgs), , drop=FALSE]
  }
  
  # Keep only those with at least 3 CpGs
  dmr_tbl <- dmr_tbl[dmr_tbl$no.cpgs >= 3, , drop=FALSE]
  dmr_tbl <- dmr_tbl[dmr_tbl$no.cpgs >= 3, , drop = FALSE]
  dmr_tbl <- dmr_tbl[order(dmr_tbl$FDR, -dmr_tbl$no.cpgs), , drop = FALSE]

  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6", "DMRcate_Tier3")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  readr::write_csv(dmr_tbl, file.path(out_dir, "dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv"))

  # Quick locus plots (top 3)
  dmr_gr <- DMRcate::extractRanges(dmrc, genome = "hg19")
  grp <- factor(meta_f$pheno_bin, labels = c("Non-mets","Mets"))
  try({
    for (i in seq_len(min(3, nrow(dmr_tbl)))) {
      png(file.path(out_dir, sprintf("dmrplot_top%02d_%s_%d_%d.png",
                                     i, dmr_tbl$chr[i], dmr_tbl$start[i], dmr_tbl$end[i])),
          width=1400, height=900, res=140)
      DMRcate::DMR.plot(ranges=dmr_gr[i], dmr=dmrc, CpGs=myAnno@ranges,
                        what="Beta", arraytype="EPICv1",
                        phen.col=grp, pch=20, toscale=TRUE,
                        plotmedians=TRUE, samp.names=FALSE)
      dev.off()
    }
  }, silent=TRUE)

  msg("✓ DMRcate Tier 3 outputs saved → ", out_dir)
}

## ── 4) Summaries ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
summarize_dmrs <- function(csv) {
  x <- readr::read_csv(csv, show_col_types = FALSE)
  if (!nrow(x)) return(tibble())
  x %>%
    mutate(width_bp = end - start + 1L,
           direction = ifelse(meanmeth.diff > 0, "hyper", "hypo")) %>%
    summarise(
      n_DMRs = n(),
      median_width_bp = median(width_bp),
      median_n_cpgs = median(no.cpgs),
      pct_hyper = mean(direction == "hyper") * 100
    )
}

paths <- list(
  any   = file.path(results_root,"results_ewas_any","H6","DMRcate_Tier3","dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv"),
  ln    = file.path(results_root,"results_ewas_ln","H6","DMRcate_Tier3","dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv"),
  dist  = file.path(results_root,"results_ewas_dist","H6","DMRcate_Tier3","dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv")
)

summary_tbl <- purrr::imap_dfr(paths, ~ dplyr::bind_cols(phenotype=.y, summarize_dmrs(.x)))
readr::write_csv(summary_tbl, file.path(results_root,"DMRcate_summary.csv"))
print(summary_tbl)

# Quick interval overlaps
read_dmr_gr <- function(csv) {
  x <- suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(csv, show_col_types = FALSE))
  if (!nrow(x)) return(GRanges())
  GRanges(seqnames = x$chr, ranges = IRanges(start = x$start, end = x$end))
}
gr_any  <- read_dmr_gr(paths$any)
gr_ln   <- read_dmr_gr(paths$ln)
gr_dist <- read_dmr_gr(paths$dist)
ov_any_ln   <- length(subsetByOverlaps(gr_any, gr_ln))
ov_any_dist <- length(subsetByOverlaps(gr_any, gr_dist))
ov_ln_dist  <- length(subsetByOverlaps(gr_ln, gr_dist))
data.frame(pair=c("any∩ln","any∩dist","ln∩dist"),
           n_overlaps=c(ov_any_ln,ov_any_dist,ov_ln_dist))
```
```{r}
library(ggplot2)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)

# --- Load DMRcate results ---
dmr <- read_csv("/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_ewas_any/H6/DMRcate_Tier3/dmrcate_lambda1000_C2_min3cpgs.csv")

# --- Clean up column names ---
dmr <- dmr %>%
  mutate(
    meanmeth.diff = ifelse(!"meanmeth.diff" %in% names(.), meanmeth.diff, meanmeth.diff),
    FDR = ifelse(!"FDR" %in% names(.), min_smoothed_fdr, FDR)
  )

# --- Cap zero FDRs to avoid log(0) issues ---
dmr$FDR[dmr$FDR == 0] <- 1e-10

# --- Create the volcano plot ---
volcano_plot <- ggplot(dmr, aes(x = meanmeth.diff, y = -log10(FDR))) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.5, size = 1.2, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_vline(xintercept = c(-0.05, 0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40") +
  labs(
    title = "DMRcate: Any Metastasis vs Non-Metastatic",
    subtitle = paste0("n = ", nrow(dmr), " DMRs (median width ≈ ", round(median(dmr$end - dmr$start)), " bp)"),
    x = "Mean methylation difference (Δβ)",
    y = expression(-log[10](FDR))
  ) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14)

# --- Render + save ---
print(volcano_plot)  # ensures display in non-interactive mode

out_dir <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_ewas_any/H6/DMRcate_Tier3/"
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "volcano_any_mets.png"), plot = volcano_plot, width = 8, height = 6, dpi = 300)
ggsave(file.path(out_dir, "volcano_any_mets.pdf"), plot = volcano_plot, width = 8, height = 6)
```


```{r}
###############################################################################
# Stable DMRcate plotting — compatible with v3.4+
###############################################################################
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(DMRcate)
  library(GenomicRanges)
  # Removed Gviz and biomaRt as they are not needed for this solution
})

# --- Verify required objects ---
stopifnot(exists("dmrc"), exists("dmr_gene_hits"), exists("myAnno"), exists("meta_f"))

# --- Output directory ---
out_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_ewas_any", "H6",
                     "DMRcate_Tier3", "DMRplots_final_v4")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# --- Define phenotype colors ---
grp <- factor(meta_f$pheno_bin, labels = c("Non-Metastatic", "Metastatic"))
cols <- c("Non-Metastatic" = "#1f78b4", "Metastatic" = "#e31a1c")

# --- Removed the gene_track creation block ---


# --- Loop through DMRs overlapping key genes ---
for (i in seq_along(dmr_gene_hits)) {
  genes_here <- dmr_gene_hits$overlapping.genes[i]
  chr_i <- as.character(seqnames(dmr_gene_hits)[i])
  start_i <- start(dmr_gene_hits)[i]
  end_i <- end(dmr_gene_hits)[i]

  message(sprintf("Plotting %s (%s:%d-%d)",
                  genes_here, chr_i, start_i, end_i))

  png(file.path(out_dir,
                sprintf("DMRplot_%s_%s_%d_%d.png",
                        genes_here, chr_i, start_i, end_i)),
      width = 1600, height = 900, res = 150)

  try({
    DMR.plot(
      ranges = dmr_gene_hits,
      dmr = i,
      CpGs = myAnno,
      what = "Beta",
      arraytype = "EPICv1",
      phen.col = cols[grp],
      # genome = "hg19",  <-- ✅ REMOVED this line to prevent Ensembl query
      flank = 2000,
      heatmap = TRUE,
      labels = paste0(genes_here, " (", chr_i, ":", start_i, "-", end_i, ")")
      # GOfunc = gene_track  <-- ✅ REMOVED this (was causing the error)
    )
  }, silent = FALSE)
  dev.off()
}

message("✅ DMRcate plots successfully saved to: ", out_dir)
```
